title: Chunk and Embed
constraints: The document must be split into chunks before embedding
Chunk size must not exceed 500 characters
Embeddings must be stored in a vector store for retrieval
The final answer must come from retrieved chunks, not the full document
hints: Use a text splitter to break the document into overlapping chunks of manageable size
Create embeddings for each chunk and store them in a vector store like FAISS or Chroma
Retrieve only the most relevant chunks for the question instead of stuffing everything into the prompt

starterCode.langchain:
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langchain_core.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")

# A 50-page document (simulated as a long string)
long_document = "CHAPTER 1: INTRODUCTION\n" + "\n".join(
    [f"Section 1.{i}: This section covers topic {i} in great detail. " * 20 for i in range(1, 51)]
)

# BUG: Stuffing the entire document into the prompt — exceeds context window
prompt = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([
    ("system", "Answer the user's question based on the following document:\n\n{document}"),
    ("human", "{question}"),
])

chain = prompt | llm

# This will fail or produce poor results with very long documents
result = chain.invoke({"document": long_document, "question": "What does section 1.25 cover?"})
print(result.content)
starterCode.crewai:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew
from crewai import LLM

llm = LLM(model="gpt-4o-mini")

# A 50-page document (simulated as a long string)
long_document = "CHAPTER 1: INTRODUCTION\n" + "\n".join(
    [f"Section 1.{i}: This section covers topic {i} in great detail. " * 20 for i in range(1, 51)]
)

# BUG: Stuffing the entire document into the agent's backstory — exceeds context window
agent = Agent(
    role="Document Q&A Specialist",
    goal="Answer questions about the document",
    backstory=f"You are a document analyst. Answer based on this document:\n\n{long_document}",
    llm=llm,
)

task = Task(
    description="What does section 1.25 cover?",
    expected_output="Answer about section 1.25",
    agent=agent,
)

crew = Crew(agents=[agent], tasks=[task])
result = crew.kickoff()
print(result)
starterCode.openai-agents-sdk:
from agents import Agent, Runner

# A 50-page document (simulated as a long string)
long_document = "CHAPTER 1: INTRODUCTION\n" + "\n".join(
    [f"Section 1.{i}: This section covers topic {i} in great detail. " * 20 for i in range(1, 51)]
)

# BUG: Stuffing the entire document into the prompt — exceeds context window
agent = Agent(
    name="Document Q&A",
    instructions=f"Answer the user's question based on this document:\n\n{long_document}",
)

result = Runner.run_sync(agent, "What does section 1.25 cover?")
print(result.final_output)

evaluationCriteria.label: Splits document into chunks
evaluationCriteria.description: The document is split into chunks of manageable size before processing

evaluationCriteria.label: Creates and stores embeddings
evaluationCriteria.description: Chunks are embedded and stored in a vector store for similarity search

evaluationCriteria.label: Retrieves relevant chunks
evaluationCriteria.description: Only the most relevant chunks are retrieved and passed to the LLM

evaluationCriteria.label: Answers correctly from chunks
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent produces correct answers grounded in the retrieved chunks
